title: pi-credit-risk run_config
description: Configuration for a single risk-analysis run. Pipeline reads this from runs/<run_id>/run_config.json (a frozen copy of the user-supplied config).

run_id.description: Unique identifier; used as the runs/<run_id>/ directory name.

input_csv.description: Path to the input feature/sample CSV. Must be readable; never written to.

target.description: Binary target column. Rows where target IS NULL are treated as historical rejections (no observable outcome) and used only in full-population rule simulation.

id_col.description: Unique customer / application id column. Excluded from modelling; used only for de-duplication and traceability.

time_col.description: Time column (apply month / observation month). Drives time-based train/test/OOT split and monthly simulation.

exclude_cols.description: Columns to exclude from modelling (target, id, time, post-loan, manual-approval, leakage).

feature_cols.description: Explicit feature whitelist. If null, all columns except target/id/time/exclude are used.

special_values.description: Per-feature special values that should bin into the SPECIAL bucket (e.g. -99, -999 for 'no data').

rejected_lift.description: Lift assigned to historical-rejection rows for reject inference.

output_dir.description: Run output directory. All artifacts live here. Will be created if missing.
